prompt: Write a standalone GDScript (no extends) with two utility functions. `set_collision_layer_bit(body: CollisionObject2D, layer: int, enabled: bool)` should set a specific bit on the collision_layer using bit manipulation. `set_collision_mask_bit(body: CollisionObject2D, layer: int, enabled: bool)` should do the same for collision_mask. Layers are 1-indexed (layer 1 = bit 0). Use bitwise OR to enable and bitwise AND NOT to disable.
evaluation_notes: Layer 1 = bit index 0, so the bit is (1 << (layer - 1)). Enable: body.collision_layer |= bit. Disable: body.collision_layer &= ~bit. Same pattern for mask.
